channel.title: briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: In a time of war with Iran, Americans unite in aggravation over sticker shock at the gas pump
Student who died after rush event had blood-alcohol level of 0.425%, autopsy says
item.description: Three leaders from the Delta Tau Delta fraternity were arrested on suspicion of hazing after the death of Colin Daniel Martinez.

item.title: Trump 'willing to live with' US report on missile strike near Iranian girls' school
item.description: President Donald Trump said on Monday he doesn't "know enough" about the strike on an Iranian elementary school that Iran says killed at least 168 peo...

item.title: Pete Hegseth, Dan Caine hold news briefing as Iran launches new attacks
item.description: Defense Secretary Pete Hegseth and Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff Dan Caine are holding a news briefing as Iran launched new attacks Tuesday at...

item.title: WATCH: Tornado threat from Texas to Great Lakes
item.description: Some 50 million Americans are on alert for potentially damaging storms, including possible tornadoes.

item.title: Iran live updates: Hegseth to address war, after Trump says it will be 'ended soon'
item.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28.

item.title: WATCH: Gen Z turns to 'grandma hobbies' to fight screen time
item.description: ABC News' Danny New profiles people embracing old-school activities for fun.

item.title: California vowed to stop hospice fraud. Our analysis found red flags across LA.
item.description: A CBS News analysis of records for every hospice operating in Los Angeles County finds indications of fraud are growing.

item.title: Defiant Iran vows to keep fighting war with U.S. "as long as it takes"
item.description: Markets stem losses as Trump says Iran war will end "very soon," but Tehran says it's "prepared to continue attacking" indefinitely, and it won't let ...

item.title: Russia and Ukraine both claim front-line progress with US-brokered talks on hold
item.description: Russian and Ukrainian officials are making contradictory claims of battlefield successes in their 4-year-old war

item.title: As U.S.-Israeli war with Iran intensifies, Trump says it is "ahead of schedule"
item.description: President Trump's assurances that a rising U.S. death toll and soaring energy prices will be temporary and worth the pain are failing to assuage jitte...

item.title: Georgia voters choosing a successor to Marjorie Taylor Greene in US House
Dignified transfer for Kentucky soldier who was the 7th US service member to die in Iran war
item.description: Vice President JD Vance joined the grieving family of a Kentucky man who was the seventh U.S. service member to die in combat during the Iran war as h...
